ddls:
CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "state_capital" TEXT /* Capital of the state */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic record */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state */,
  "demographic_category" TEXT /* Category of demographic information (e.g., ethnicity, income level) */,
  "demographic_value" REAL /* Value of demographic information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tests" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test */,
  "test_name" TEXT /* Name of the test */,
  "test_description" TEXT /* Description of the test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_administrations" (
  "administration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test administration */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state */,
  "administration_date" TEXT /* Date the test was administered */,
  "num_students_tested" INTEGER /* Number of students who took the test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("administration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_administrations_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES tests ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_administrations_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participation_rates" (
  "participation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participation record */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state */,
  "participation_rate" REAL /* Percentage of students participating in standardized tests */,
  "participation_rate_trend" REAL /* Trend of participation rate over time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participation_rates_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each score record */,
  "administration_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test administration */,
  "subject" TEXT /* Subject of the test */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score achieved in the test */,
  "section1_score" INTEGER /* Score achieved in section 1 of the test */,
  "section2_score" INTEGER /* Score achieved in section 2 of the test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_scores_administration_id FOREIGN KEY ("administration_id") REFERENCES test_administrations ("administration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "total_scores" (
  "total_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each total score record */,
  "administration_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test administration */,
  "total_score" INTEGER /* Total score from all standardized tests */,
  "section1_total_score" INTEGER /* Total score from section 1 of the test */,
  "section2_total_score" INTEGER /* Total score from section 2 of the test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("total_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_total_scores_administration_id FOREIGN KEY ("administration_id") REFERENCES test_administrations ("administration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric record */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state */,
  "participation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the participation rate */,
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test scores */,
  "total_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the total scores */,
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the demographic information */,
  "subject" TEXT /* Subject of the test */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Performance metric value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_total_id FOREIGN KEY ("total_id") REFERENCES total_scores ("total_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_demographic_id FOREIGN KEY ("demographic_id") REFERENCES demographics ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_score_id FOREIGN KEY ("score_id") REFERENCES test_scores ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_participation_id FOREIGN KEY ("participation_id") REFERENCES participation_rates ("participation_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each demographic record
Category of demographic information (e.g., ethnicity, income level)
